final:
module eeprom_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we,
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    reg [7:0] memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (we) begin memory <= data_in ; // Write operation
  end
  end

  always @(posedge clk) begin
  data_out <= memory ;
  end
endmodule
